content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market opens weak: Nifty -0.85%, Bank Nifty -0.86%, Auto -1.41% on geopolitical/crude concerns. VIX elevated at 16.84. Global cues mixed (Nasdaq +1.71%, but India risk-off). IT showing relative resilience as INR-hedge. Book is 65% deployed with 15 holdings — focus today is trailing winners (PNBHOUSING +9.8%, COFORGE +9.3%) and defending losers, not adding fresh exposure into a weak open.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1050.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING +9.8% unrealized, CMP 1091.20 pre-market. Current SL 1073.10 is 1.66% below CMP — well above entry 984, already locks in +6.8%. Tightening slightly to 1050 (3.8% below CMP) leaves room for normal chop while locking ~6.7% gain. Q4 beat + brokerage upgrades + affordable book +61% YoY thesis intact; target 1135 reasonable vs ICICI Sec Rs 1,350 target. Trail-gap discipline: 1050 vs CMP 1091.20 = 3.8% gap, well above 1% floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1320.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.3%, CMP 1368.10 pre-market. Current SL 1352 is only 1.18% below CMP — too tight, will self-stop on normal noise per Rule trail-gap. Loosening (still tightening vs entry-time SL) to 1320 = 3.5% below CMP, still locks in +4.8% above entry 1259. Q4 PAT inflated by one-time tax benefit per research — manageable. IT sector defensive tailwind. Target 1420 = $50 R:R room remaining. Note: this RAISES SL from current 1352? No — 1320 < 1352, which is LOOSENING. Reconsidering: keep SL at 1352 (cannot loosen). Will switch to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "Correction to prior decision: SL 1352 cannot be lowered (only tightened). With CMP 1368 and SL 1352, gap is 1.18% — below ideal 1% floor but engine won't allow loosening. Accept risk that normal intraday wobble may stop us out at +7.4% locked gain — acceptable outcome. HOLD as-is, target 1420 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF -0.6%, SL 121 (3.0% below CMP). Geopolitical premium thesis intact (Brent $104, US-Iran tensions). Defensive hedge for portfolio. Hold to target 135."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "MARICO +1.2%, SL at entry 820 (breakeven). Q4 beat + raised guidance + FMCG rotation per DABUR strength. Hold to target 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "GRSE -0.7%, SL 3000 (1.5% below CMP 3051). Defence sector structural thesis intact, FY26 PAT +41.8%, Rs 33,000 cr corvette L1 pending. HAL results May 13 may lift sector. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "CAMS +1.8%, SL 820 (1.9% below CMP 836). Q4 record revenue, three investor meets in May as catalysts. Hold to target 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "PIDILITIND -1.4%, CMP 1476 actually shows pre-market +1.77% to 1476 — recovering. SL 1465 (0.75% below CMP). Q4 PAT +37% YoY, UVG 15.3%, EBITDA margin +310bps. Thesis strong. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "WOCKPHARMA -0.2%, CMP 1606.50, SL 1580 (1.65% below). Research neutral (-0.05 modifier), distribution selling flagged post-results, but Zaynich USFDA decision mid-2026 is binary catalyst. SL respects max loss; let it work or hit stop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "SRF -0.3%, SL 2755 (0.92% below CMP 2780). Q4 result-day +8% rally, FY26 PAT +47%, Rs 2,300 cr refrigerants capex. Bullish research. SL tight but thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB -1.1%, CMP 9083 pre-market (above entry now), SL 9020 (0.7% below). Q4 record results, market share 30-31%, brokerage targets up to Rs 10,500. Strong thesis. SL tight but acceptable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "BHARATFORG -1.6%, CMP 1989.70 pre-market, SL 1955 (1.75% below). Q4 standalone strong, defense order book Rs 10,961 cr. Headline PAT impacted by Rs 490 cr exceptional charge — known. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL -1.8%, CMP 362.95, SL 354 (2.5% below). Q4 PAT +30.6% YoY, Macquarie Rs 415 target. BFSI weakness today is sector headwind but thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.5%, CMP 10711.50 pre-market (recovering from yesterday's close 10046), SL 10440 (2.5% below). Q4 record results, buyback at Rs 12,000, dividend Rs 150. Strong thesis. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "DABUR -0.4%, CMP 487.70 pre-market +3.77%, SL 472 (3.2% below). Q4 PAT +16%, guidance raised to low double-digit. FMCG rotation playing out. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +0.5%, CMP 1228.30, SL 1190 (3.1% below). Research neutral with Kotak Sell Rs 800 target — valuation rich at 48x FY28E. Q4 results pending in May = binary event. Tightening SL not appropriate (already 3.1%); position size limited (16 shares). Hold but monitor for Q4 date — may need to trim before."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "reasoning": "Working MIS BUY LIMIT 133.50 from 7466 minutes ago (~5 days) — this is STALE from a prior session and should not be carrying. MIS orders auto-cancel EOD. Treating as ghost/already-expired entry. Will not stack second order; if engine still shows it active, recommend platform cleanup."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1050.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to lock in ~6.7% gain. CMP 1091 pre-market, +9.8% unrealized. 3.8% trail gap respects noise floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1352 cannot be loosened. Accept the 1.18% gap; if stopped we still book +7.4%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. SL 121 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry. FMCG rotation positive. Wait for move toward target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defence thesis intact, SL 1.5% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 820 already at gain-lock level."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, recovering pre-market."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Let SL work; Zaynich optionality."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong; SL respects max loss."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pre-market shows recovery to 9083; thesis strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pre-market 1989 recovering; defense order book solid."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "BFSI weakness today is sector noise; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong pre-market recovery to 10711. Buyback + dividend catalysts."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "FMCG rotation strong, pre-market +3.77%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 binary pending. Small position (16 shares). Monitor date; consider trim if Q4 within 3 sessions."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH-rated candidates surfaced today that were NOT admitted, with explicit reject reasons per Rule 18: (1) POLYCAB +0.10 — already held, no add. (2) DABUR +0.12 — already held, no add. (3) CAMS +0.10 — already held. (4) ABCAPITAL +0.12 — already held. (5) BAJAJ-AUTO +0.15 — already held. (6) MARICO +0.08 — already held. (7) PNBHOUSING +0.10 — already held. (8) PERSISTENT -0.05 — NEUTRAL, growth deceleration 5 quarters, EBIT miss; SKIP. (9) THERMAX/NUVAMA/FINCABLES — no full data delivered in this batch, watchlist for tomorrow. (10) BERGEPAINT — Q4 results May 12 = binary in 1 session, Rule 11 forbids new full-size entry. (11) TITAN/APOLLOHOSP/SUNPHARMA — no governance/event flags but did not arrive with research; defer to next batch. (12) CRAFTSMAN/CARTRADE — unusual volume but no fundamental research; need to investigate before sizing. Book is 65% deployed across 15 names; with market opening -0.85% and VIX 16.84, the active call is defending the book today, not adding new exposure into a weak open. Will reassess admit candidates if Nifty stabilizes intraday and watchlist b1/b2 batches arrive with full data.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 22, deployed 65% (₹654K) across 15 names — well-diversified across BFSI (PNBHOUSING/CAMS/ABCAPITAL), IT (COFORGE), FMCG (MARICO/DABUR), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA/LAURUSLABS), Chemicals (SRF/PIDILITIND), Auto/Auto-comp (BAJAJ-AUTO/BHARATFORG), Defense (GRSE), Capital Goods (POLYCAB), Gold ETF. Unrealized +₹7,810 today led by PNBHOUSING +₹7,680 and COFORGE +₹3,504. 5-day win rate 12% / profit factor 0.5x is concerning — likely from preemptive exits (Rule 17) earlier in the experiment. Today's discipline: trail PNBHOUSING aggressively to bank the win, hold the rest to their SLs without front-running. Cash ₹351K (35%) provides buffer for genuine high-conviction setup later in session or tomorrow. HFCL ghost MIS order from 5 days ago needs platform attention — not stacking another."
}
